endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Resources/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.Resources REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Resources/links
endpoints.description: Gets all the linked resources for the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /{linkId}
endpoints.description: Gets a resource link with the specified ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LINKID}} with a real linkid.

endpoints.name: PUT /{linkId}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a resource link between the specified resources.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LINKID}} with a real linkid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{linkId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a resource link with the specified ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LINKID}} with a real linkid.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Resources/links
endpoints.description: Gets a list of resource links at and below the specified source scope.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.
